title: Hide And Seek Deluxe
description: This is almost a standard mini game of hide and seek. Its difference is that when you put on a player, you do not need to run after him
body:
# ABOUT
This is almost a standard mini game of hide and seek. Its difference is that when you put on a player, you do not need to run after him, you have a stick in your hands, by pressing RMB the player is caught and becomes a seeker. No matter how far he is or not, the stick will still get him)

# Commands
### Admin Commands:
- /hs arena create <arenaName> <minPlayers> <maxPlayers> - create a new arena
- /hs arena setLobby <arenaName> - set arena lobby
- /hs arena setHidersSpawn <arenaName> - set hiders spawn
- /hs arena setSeekersSpawn <arenaName> - set seeker spawn
### Regular commands:
- /hs join <arenaName> - enter the game
- /hs leave <arenaName> - exit the game
